title: Andreas Strangmüller
text: Home * People * Andreas Strangmüller Andreas Strangmüller [1] Andreas Strangmüller , a German correspondence chess player and World Champion of the International Email Chess Group [2] [3] in the 2004 cycle [4] . Since August 2013, Andreas Strangmüller maintains the FGRL computer chess engine rating list [5] , further conducting experiments concerning branching factor and engine strength as function of search time , transposition table size, processor type , and number of threads .
